description: Create the @quant/quant-studio package with .qapp format definition, Quant SDK core, sandbox runtime, build pipeline, and publish/remix system. This is the complete Phase 74 implementation in a single coherent package.
steps: Create packages/quant-studio/package.json following the pattern from packages/quant-codex/package.json. Name: @quant/quant-studio, type: module, scripts: typecheck/test/build/lint. Add zod as a dependency for schema validation.

Create packages/quant-studio/tsconfig.json following the pattern from packages/quant-codex/tsconfig.json (target ES2022, module ESNext, moduleResolution bundler, composite true, outDir dist, rootDir src).

Create packages/quant-studio/src/types.ts defining all core types: QAppManifest (name, version, permissions, entryPoint, assets, author, description), Permission enum (camera, storage, network, ai, identity, payments), QAppBundle, SandboxConfig, SDKContext, PublishMetadata, RemixInfo, EarningSplit.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/manifest/validator.ts - ManifestValidator class that validates .qapp manifest.json against the schema using zod. Must enforce: required fields present, permissions are valid enum values, version is semver, entry point path exists in assets list, name is alphanumeric+hyphens.
Create packages/quant-studio/src/manifest/schema.ts - The zod schema definitions for manifest.json validation.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/sdk/quant-sdk.ts - The QuantSDK class providing the UGC app API surface. Implements: identity (getUserId, getProfile with consent check), scores (submitScore, getLeaderboard, unlockAchievement), multiplayer (createSession, joinSession, broadcastState), ai (infer with prompt/model routing), storage (get/set/delete key-value, putFile/getFile), tips (requestTip, getTipHistory). Each method checks that the required permission is declared.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/sdk/permission-gate.ts - PermissionGate class that enforces declared permissions. Constructor takes the manifest's permission list. Methods: check(permission) returns boolean, enforce(permission) throws if not declared, listGranted() returns declared permissions.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/sandbox/runtime.ts - SandboxRuntime class implementing the secure execution environment. Provides: CSP policy generation (generateCSP returns Content-Security-Policy string), resource limits configuration (maxCPU, maxMemory, maxNetworkRequests), IPC bridge (postMessage/onMessage between sandbox and host), permission enforcement integration with PermissionGate.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/sandbox/csp.ts - CSP policy builder that generates restrictive Content-Security-Policy based on declared permissions. Default: block all. Permissions unlock specific directives (e.g., 'network' allows connect-src, 'camera' allows media device access).

Create packages/quant-studio/src/sandbox/ipc-bridge.ts - IPCBridge class for communication between sandboxed app and host. Methods: send(channel, payload), on(channel, handler), destroy(). Validates message format, enforces size limits (max 1MB per message), rate limits (max 100 messages/second).

Create packages/quant-studio/src/build/pipeline.ts - BuildPipeline class that creates .qapp bundles. Methods: build(sourceDir, manifest) validates manifest, bundles assets, optimizes (minification flag), validates total size (max 50MB), returns QAppBundle. Supports input types: raw HTML/JS/CSS, Phaser projects (detect by phaser dependency), React apps (detect by react dependency), imported WebGL (detect by .wasm or canvas entry).

Create packages/quant-studio/src/build/bundler.ts - AssetBundler class that collects and optimizes assets. Methods: collectAssets(sourceDir) returns file list, validateSize(files, maxBytes) checks bundle size, createBundle(files, manifest) packages into QAppBundle structure.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/publish/publisher.ts - Publisher class managing the publish flow. Methods: publish(bundle, metadata) validates bundle + creates store listing, unpublish(appId, version), getVersions(appId) returns version history.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/publish/remix.ts - RemixManager class for fork/remix. Methods: fork(appId, newAuthor) creates a remix with attribution chain, getAttribution(appId) returns original author chain, calculateEarnings(appId, revenue) splits earnings (70% creator, 20% remixer chain, 10% platform).
Create packages/quant-studio/src/index.ts barrel export file exporting all public types and classes.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/__tests__/manifest.test.ts - Tests for manifest validation: valid manifest passes, missing required fields fail, invalid permissions fail, non-semver version fails, entry point not in assets fails.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/__tests__/sdk.test.ts - Tests for QuantSDK: SDK methods work with correct permissions, SDK methods throw PermissionDeniedError when permission not declared, each SDK module (identity/scores/multiplayer/ai/storage/tips) has at least one happy-path test.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/__tests__/sandbox.test.ts - Tests for sandbox runtime: CSP generation produces valid policy string, permission gate blocks unauthorized access, IPC bridge enforces message size limits, IPC bridge enforces rate limits, resource limits are configurable.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/__tests__/build.test.ts - Tests for build pipeline: produces valid QAppBundle from source, rejects bundles over size limit, detects project type (phaser/react/raw), validates manifest before building.

Create packages/quant-studio/src/__tests__/publish.test.ts - Tests for publish and remix: publish creates store listing, unpublish removes listing, fork creates remix with attribution, earning split calculates correctly (70/20/10), getAttribution returns full chain.
acceptance_criteria: Running `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-studio typecheck` passes with no errors
Running `pnpm --filter @quant/quant-studio test` passes all tests (expect 20+ test cases)
ManifestValidator correctly validates and rejects manifests per schema
QuantSDK methods enforce permission checks (throw when permission not declared)
SandboxRuntime generates valid CSP strings based on permissions
IPCBridge enforces message size limit (1MB) and rate limit (100/s)
BuildPipeline produces QAppBundle and rejects oversized bundles
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-studio typecheck
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm --filter @quant/quant-studio test
